ab: siRab masulun iku tu bai ku matiw sa qizuanan baliw, temiyam baliw. muwaza niazasan na bai ku tu nipaluman na tu tened, meRamaz tu qaqanan na yencumin paqan tu semaqsaqay ay.
ch: 昨天我跟奶奶去市集擺攤，奶奶帶了許多自己種的蔬菜去，也製作了原住民美食給大家。
en: Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

ab: mazemun ay melizaq tu tiyam na bai ku, mazemun meRasa tu sidi’ seRay kakulut, mazemun qaya temadam tu niRamazan na.
ch: 大家很喜歡奶奶的攤位，辣椒和車輪茄很多人買，許多人來品嘗她煮的菜餚。
en: Everyone loved my grandmother’s stall. Many people bought the chilis and African eggplants, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

ab: nengi qanan niRamazan na tu tusuzan, senapuwaR seRay nitim ay ’si na babuy na naung Ramesan tu tani, paqawtu tu mazemun semaqsaqay ay bangsis na, niz ti mawtu paylit melana ta tiyaman niaq.
ch: 她煮的長埂滿天星和糯米飯非常好吃，還有用山豬肉煮的刺蔥滷肉，味道吸引了很多客人，大家都來我們攤位排隊。
en: The Sessile Alternanthera and sticky rice she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.

ab: yau meRamaz bai ku nani, yau iku qumRas paqawtu tu semaqsaqay ay. baluduq iku ta kinilan, “tened zau nizu nipaluman niaq, mai puiyu ay, qalazuk ka qawtu Rasa yu!”
ch: 奶奶煮東西的時候，我在旁邊招攬客人。我在一旁大喊著：「蔬菜都是自己種的，天然有機，趕快來買喔!」
en: While my grandmother was cooking, I was on the side attracting customers. I shouted, “The vegetables are self-grown, all-natural and organic! Come and buy now!”

ab: kikiya ma maniz ti baliw Ribang niaq, semanu bai ku, “yau nipanmuan su qawka.”
ch: 我們的東西很快就賣完了，奶奶說：「都是因為有你的幫忙。」
en: Our goods sold out quickly, and my grandmother said, “It’s all thanks to your help.”

ab: ta wawayan zau, muwaza nisinanam ku tu qenasuppaRan tu tened seRay qaqanan na yencumin, suppaRan ku ti pilay temiyam baliw tu Ribang.
ch: 這個活動，我學到了有關原住民植物和食品的知識，並且體驗到了擺攤的辛苦。
en: Through this event, I learned about indigenous plants and food and experienced the hard work of running a stall.

ab: nitaytan ku tu waway na bai ku melizaq tu qaqanan na lazatan niaq, muRebu iku timaizipana.
ch: 看到了奶奶對傳統食物的熱愛，我感到非常驕傲和榮幸。
en: Seeing my grandmother’s passion for traditional food, I feel very proud and honored.
